title: Ensure that Automatic Quarantine is enabled

input_row.title: Ensure that Automatic Quarantine is enabled
input_row.description: Enable automatic quarantine of virus protection in Security Center.
input_row.rationale: Once a virus is detected, the automatic quarantine feature prevents the virus from being executed.
input_row.audit: Through the management console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. Select Settings. 3. Click General. 4. Ensure Virus Blocking is enabled.
input_row.remediation: Through the management console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. Select Settings. 3. Click General. 4. Enable Virus Blocking.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Manual

**MANUAL STEPS:**
1. Logon to the Alibaba Cloud Security Center Console.
2. Navigate to the "Settings" option in the left-hand menu.
3. Click on the "General" tab within the Settings page.
4. Verify the status of "Virus Blocking" to see if it is enabled.

   - **What to verify/validate**: Confirm that the "Virus Blocking" option is turned on.
   - **Expected secure configuration**: The "Virus Blocking" should be enabled.

5. To confirm compliance, check if the Virus Blocking setting is showing as active; if it is not enabled, corrective action needs to be taken to enable it. 

Make sure to document the current status for audit records, and if any changes were made during the verification process, provide a detailed confirmation of the enablement of the Virus Blocking feature.
